title: pavonia pentacarpos
intro: Pavonia pentacarpos, also known as the Rock Rose or Pavonia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Malvaceae family. The medicinal properties of Pavonia pentacarpos lie in its ability to act as an astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Pavonia pentacarpos can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
